nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: White-throated wren-babbler
nodes.summary: The white-throated wren-babbler (Napothera pasquieri) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is endemic to northwestern Vietnam (Fansipan mountains). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70–291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.

nodes.name: Napothera
nodes.summary: Napothera（Napothera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如纹胸鹪鹛、Sumatran wren-babbler、White-throated wren-babbler等6种鸟类。
